center.name: 太平洋諸島
center.summary: 太平洋諸島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括澳洲潜鸭、Long-tailed koel，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a migratory bird that spends spring and summer in New Zealand, its only breeding place, and spends winter in the Pacific islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The common name "hardhead" has nothing to do with the density of the bird's skull, instead referring to the difficulty encountered by early taxidermists in processing the head. Hardheads are found in wetter, coastal regions of Australia, particularly in the south-east, but are known to disperse as far afield as New Guinea, New Zealand, and the Pacific Islands.{{cite journal |title=Hardhead: Aythya australis |last1=Carboneras |first1=C
